Document:
# Melee Weapons
Here you can find information about the melee weapons available in the Wasteland.
When ammunition runs dry or silence is required, melee weapons are a survivor's best friend. They never run out of ammo, but they require getting close — and that carries its own risks.
Melee weapons are divided into:
- [color=#a4885c]One-Handed[/color] — Knives, hatchets, batons, and short blades. Quick to swing and easy to carry alongside a firearm. - [color=#a4885c]Two-Handed[/color] — Spears, sledgehammers, greatswords, and long blades. Slower but hit harder.
